5.response: {"Q0":"Not if I noticed the planet colour. I tried to look at planet colour but may have missed it if concentrating on the tools too much. "}

11.response: {"Q0":"I really have no idea.  My ability to concentrate was the main thing."}

13.response: {"Q0":"I really enjoyed playing this.  It didn't go on too long, in fact I would have happily gone on for longer."}

0.response: {"Q0":"No strategy. Just tried to concentrate on the colour of the planets to know whether to dig or not. sometimes my figures pressed erratically and i picked the wrong tool but most of the time I was correct (I think)."}

7.response: {"Q0":"Not really. I just hoped they would contain gems but I couldn't control it so wasn't bothered."}

9.response: {"Q0":"No. I tried to focus on all the same."}

2.response: {"Q0":"I'd say less than 50% of the time. Seemed to be mostly grey rocks."}

8.response: {"Q0":"I generally tried to go with the highest probability of a win unless the probabilities were close in value in which case i wanted to go with the higher win value. It was hard to pick the right arrow direction and sometimes I just pressed either to make sure I was within the time."}

3.response: {"Q0":"Yes of course. I only received it once but it was easy to remember."}
